pi_items.verified_value: approximately [-1.55, -0.75] based on geographic extent from The Needles (west) to Selsey Bill area (east)
pi_items.source: Web search for Solent maritime area. The Solent stretches from The Needles and Hurst Point westward to Selsey Bill and Foreland eastward.

pi_items.verified_value: IMO Resolution A.960(23) adopted December 5, 2003. Titled 'Recommendations on Training and Certification and on Operational Procedures for Maritime Pilots other than Deep-Sea Pilots'

pi_items.metadata_value: Section A (Ship Particulars), Section B (Propulsion), Section C (Maneuvering), Section D (Anchoring), Section E (Bridge Equipment), Section F (Communications)
pi_items.verified_value: Standard IMO pilot cards typically include: Ship's Particulars, Loaded/Ballast Manifold, Air Draught, Engine, Steering, Equipment Checked (with specific systems: anchors, whistle, radar, navigation, steering gear, VHF, etc.), Equipment Operational Defects, Other Important Details, Master's Signature. Not formally labeled A-F in IMO standard.

pi_items.metadata_value: Bridge Command simulator with Models directory
pi_items.verified_value: Bridge Command is real open-source maritime simulator. Source: https://github.com/bridgecommand/bc. Project includes configurable Models, Scenarios, and World directories.
Realistic maritime pilotage parameters for daylight operations. Standard visibility threshold is 8nm for good visibility.
pi_items.source: Standard maritime practice for pilotage operations

pi_items.verified_value: Verifier.py line 174 checks 'if traffic_count >= 2' for task success

privileged_info_summary: Bridge Command is a real open-source maritime simulator with Models and Scenarios directories. The Nab Tower location is accurately described at approximately 50.6675°N, 0.9512°W. IMO Resolution A.960(23) is a real document from December 2003 covering maritime pilot procedures. The task specifies Solent coordinates [50.60-50.80°N, -1.10 to -0.80°W], which captures the central Solent but excludes the western extent near The Needles (~50.39°N). The pilot card section model (A-F: Particulars, Propulsion, Maneuvering, Anchoring, Equipment, Communications) does not match standard IMO pilot card structure, which includes more sections without formal A-F labels. The task requires minimum 2 traffic vessels and visibility exceeding 8nm for daylight Solent approach scenarios.
